omniProcessElements.name: IP_SaveAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Competency_SaveAssessmentResponse", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "omniProcessId" : "%omniProcessId%", "omniscriptId" : "%omniscriptId%", "Step1" : "%Step1%", "AssessmentEnvelopeItemId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_RunningContext" : "IP_SaveAssessmentResponse", "Err_CtxId" : "%ContextId%", "Err_ProcessType" : "IP", "AssessmentName" : "1.5 Certification of Competency (UC Physician)" }, "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

childElements.name: ADMINISTRATIVE_AND_LEGAL
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "ADMINISTRATIVE AND LEGAL – INCLUDING:
  • Familiar with guidelines regarding transfer of patients
  • Proficient in basic computer skills required for completing electronic medical records order entry
  • Familiar with the requirements of EMTALA
  • Familiar with the requirements for medical screening examination for patients and my obligatio
", "text" : "ADMINISTRATIVE AND LEGAL –
INCLUDING:

  • Familiar with guidelines regarding transfer of
    patients

  • Proficient in basic computer skills required for
    completing electronic medical records order
    entry

  • Familiar with the requirements of EMTALA

  • Familiar with the requirements for medical
    screening examination for patients and my
    obligatio

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: ADMINISTRATIVE_AND_LEGAL_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: AIRWAY_TECHNIQUES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "AIRWAY TECHNIQUES-INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Endotracheal intubation
    • \n
  • Insertion of temporary airway (LMA/KING)
    • \n
  • Use of bag mask ventilation
    • \n
  • Insertion of nasal trumpet
    • \n
", "text" : "AIRWAY TECHNIQUES-INCLUDING:

  • Endotracheal intubation

  • Insertion of temporary airway (LMA/KING)

  • Use of bag mask ventilation

  • Insertion of nasal trumpet

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CARDIAC
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "CARDIAC – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Cardiopulmonary resuscitation
    • \n
  • Electrocardiogram (interpretation of 12 leads)
    • \n
  • Emergency cardioversion/defibrillation
    • \n
  • Initial evaluation of chest pain/AMI \ndysrhythmia with rapid initiation of transfer
    • \n
  • Use of an AED
    • \n
", "text" : "CARDIAC – INCLUDING:

  • Cardiopulmonary resuscitation

  • Electrocardiogram (interpretation of 12 leads)

  • Emergency cardioversion/defibrillation

  • Initial evaluation of chest pain/AMI
    dysrhythmia with rapid initiation of transfer

  • Use of an AED

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DIAGNOSTIC_THERAPEUTIC_PROCEDURES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "DIAGNOSTIC & THERAPEUTIC PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:
  • Arthrocentesis
  • Urethral catheterization
  • Nail trephination
  • Incision and drainage of abscesses
  • Slit lamp exam
  • Preliminary plain film interpretations
  • Ocular tonometry
  • Local anesthesia
  • Digital anesthesia block
  • Trigger point injection
  • Foreign body removal from superficial site or readily accessible body cavities
", "text" : "DIAGNOSTIC & THERAPEUTIC
PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:

  • Arthrocentesis

  • Urethral catheterization

  • Nail trephination

  • Incision and drainage of abscesses

  • Slit lamp exam

  • Preliminary plain film interpretations

  • Ocular tonometry

  • Local anesthesia

  • Digital anesthesia block

  • Trigger point injection

  • Foreign body removal from superficial site or
    readily accessible body cavities

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: DIAGNOSTIC_THERAPEUTIC_PROCEDURES_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ENT
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "ENT – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Indirect laryngoscopy
    • \n
  • Evaluation and management of sore throat
    • \n
  • Evaluation and management of sinusitis
    • \n
  • Evaluation and management of ear \ncomplaints
    • \n
  • Insertion of nasal packing for epistaxis control
    • \n
  • Local cautery for epistaxis control
    • \n
", "text" : "ENT – INCLUDING:

  • Indirect laryngoscopy

  • Evaluation and management of sore throat

  • Evaluation and management of sinusitis

  • Evaluation and management of ear
    complaints

  • Insertion of nasal packing for epistaxis control

  • Local cautery for epistaxis control

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: OBSTETRICAL_GYNECOLOGICAL_PROCEDURES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "OBSTETRICAL/GYNECOLOGICAL PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:
  • Performance of pelvic examination
  • Evaluation and management of pelvic pain
  • Evaluation and management of sexually transmitted diseases
  • Evaluation and management of early pregnancy/minor vaginal bleed/discharge
  • Incision and drainage of Bartolin cyst/placement of Word catheter
  • Evaluation and management of minor vaginal bleeding/discharge
", "text" : "OBSTETRICAL/GYNECOLOGICAL PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:

  • Performance of pelvic examination

  • Evaluation and management of pelvic pain

  • Evaluation and management of sexually transmitted
    diseases

  • Evaluation and management of early
    pregnancy/minor vaginal bleed/discharge

  • Incision and drainage of Bartolin cyst/placement of Word catheter

  • Evaluation and management of minor vaginal
    bleeding/discharge

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

    \n

childElements.name: OCCUPATIONAL_MEDICINE_INJURY_EVALUATION
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "OCCUPATIONAL MEDICINE INJURY EVALUATION – INCLUDING:
  • Evaluation and management of back pain/acute strain
  • Evaluation and management of neck pain/strain
  • Evaluation and management of wrist pain/carpel tunnel syndrome
  • Understanding and adherence to state post injury guidelines
  • Completion of worker’s compensation post Injury Forms
  • Performance of fitness for duty examination
  • Determining work status post Injury/return to work guidelines
", "text" : "OCCUPATIONAL MEDICINE INJURY EVALUATION – INCLUDING:

  • Evaluation and management of back
    pain/acute strain

  • Evaluation and management of neck
    pain/strain

  • Evaluation and management of wrist
    pain/carpel tunnel syndrome

  • Understanding and adherence to state post
    injury guidelines

  • Completion of worker’s compensation post
    Injury Forms

  • Performance of fitness for duty examination

  • Determining work status post Injury/return to
    work guidelines

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: OCCUPATIONAL_MEDICINE_INJURY_EVALUATION_Response
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: OCCUPATIONAL_MEDICINE_PROCEDURES
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "OCCUPATIONAL MEDICINE PROCEDURES - INCLUDING:
  • Performance of certified DOT examinations
  • Performance of fire/police examinations
  • Certification as Medical Review Officer
  • Development of compliant post injury drug testing program
  • Interpretation and management of negative and positive post injury, random and other work related drug screens
  • Interpretation of pulmonary function testing
  • Interpretation of audiometry testing
", "text" : "OCCUPATIONAL MEDICINE PROCEDURES - INCLUDING:

  • Performance of certified DOT examinations

  • Performance of fire/police examinations

  • Certification as Medical Review Officer

  • Development of compliant post injury drug
    testing program

  • Interpretation and management of negative
    and positive post injury, random and other
    work related drug screens

  • Interpretation of pulmonary function testing

  • Interpretation of audiometry testing

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "Response", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : "Yes", "value" : "Yes", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : "No", "value" : "No", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

    \n

    • \n
  • Management of common eye complaints/infections
    • \n
  • Management of ocular trauma
    • \n

  • Management of common eye complaints/infections

childElements.name: ORTHOPEDICS
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "ORTHOPEDICS – INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Emergent/urgent closed reduction and splinting of fractures
    • \n
  • Emergent/urgent closed reduction and splinting of simple dislocation of finger, shoulder, elbow, patella
    • \n
  • Application of leg traction splint
    • \n
  • Joint aspiration
    • \n
  • Joint injection/li>\n
", "text" : "ORTHOPEDICS – INCLUDING:

  • Emergent/urgent closed reduction and splinting of fractures

  • Emergent/urgent closed reduction and splinting of simple dislocation of finger, shoulder, elbow, patella

  • Application of leg traction splint

  • Joint aspiration

  • Joint injection/li>
", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: PEDIATRICS
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "PEDIATRICS - INCLUDING:\n
    \n
  • Evaluation and management of pediatric fever
    • \n
  • 0-28 days
    • \n
  • 29 days to 36 months
    • \n
  • >36 months
    • \n
  • Reduction of radial head dislocation
    • \n
", "text" : "PEDIATRICS - INCLUDING:

  • Evaluation and management of pediatric fever

  • 0-28 days

  • 29 days to 36 months

  • >36 months

  • Reduction of radial head dislocation

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }
